module.name: venn
module.description: Two- or three-circle Venn diagram. Body = one section per circle label; optional intersection label via `center`.
module.aiSpec:
A VENN diagram (2 or 3 overlapping circles) for showing shared vs distinct attributes. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one SHORT label per circle (2 or 3 sections). Keep labels to a few words. For more than 3 sets use a different visual.
Parameters: center — label for the full intersection (default "" = none). color — first circle colour (default var(--accent-color)). color2 — second circle colour (default "#ef4444" red). color3 — third circle colour, only used with 3 sets (default "#22c55e" green). opacity — circle fill opacity, 0..1 (default 0.45). maxwidth — rendered max width, any CSS length (default "400px").
<!-- @venn center: Sweet spot, color2: #f59e0b --> Desirable <!-- @ --> Feasible <!-- @ --> Viable <!-- @end -->

param.name: center
param.label: Intersection label
param.desc: Label placed in the full intersection (blank = none).

param.name: color
param.label: First circle color
param.desc: Fill colour of the first circle.

param.name: color2
param.label: Second circle color
param.desc: Fill colour of the second circle.

param.name: color3
param.label: Third circle color
param.desc: Fill colour of the third circle (used only with 3 sets).

param.name: opacity
param.label: Circle opacity
param.desc: Fill opacity of the circles (0 = transparent, 1 = solid).

param.name: maxwidth
param.label: Max width
param.desc: Rendered maximum width, any CSS length, e.g. 400px or 24em.

snippet.label: Venn (3 circles)
snippet.description: Three overlapping circles with an intersection label.
